brief_summary: One paragraph summarizing what the customer told the Manager in Phase 1: who they are, what they know, what audience access they have, and their constraints. This is for the Manager's context, not to be read aloud to the customer.

options.title: Short punchy name for the product
options.summary: 1–2 sentences: what the product is and who buys it.
options.why_it_fits: 1 sentence tying this directly to something the customer told us about themselves.
options.first_step: One concrete, low-effort action they can do today. Something like: 'post a single tweet asking X' or 'record a 10-minute Loom explaining Y'.
evidence: Short bullet of supporting evidence (market signal, similar product doing well, audience size, etc.)
